title: Mixed Mobs
description: A mod that mix 2 mobs to create a new one... 6 times
body:
## Ocelot Blaze
A fiery fusion of ocelots and blazes.  
It shoots balls of wool that **slow down its target**, but beware — it must stay away from water or it won’t last long!  

![Blaze Ocelot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff9944da762f6669ae8f0133707f4d47c098b544.jpeg)

---

## Chicken Hoglin
This strange hybrid is a chicken that **eats eggs to grow bigger**.  
The larger it becomes, the stronger its **strength** and **resistance** effects.  

![Chicken Hoglin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/111bbfd76ae8b0b4deb4130956e03d80e94844b4.jpeg)

---

## Pillager Warden
A terrifying mix between a Pillager and a Warden.  
It can appear during raids, firing **warden arrows** that cause massive knockback.  
It also summons **sculk meteors**, dealing devastating damage to anything nearby.  

![Pillager Warden](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/182fb553960fad1e0e7e69e9f7c0832fae8790c1.jpeg)

---

## Parrot Allay
An Allay with the vibrant colors of a red parrot.  
It can be **tamed with cookies**, and once tamed, it grants its owner buffs depending on the **music played by the nearest jukebox**.  

![Allay Parrot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d2ba8540a49dcf444a75f48a64280d5ec53c614.jpeg)

---

## Queen Bee
Inspired by the Snow Golem, this **Queen Bee** can shoot its stinger at enemies.  
When injured, it may lose its abdomen, exploding into a **cloud of poison** upon impact.  

![Queen Bee Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f71da85436e42fc1d0765ed150c434cc3842bbe.png)

---

## Lama Ravager
This large version of the Lama spawns in raids and can shoot **powerful spits** at the player that slows him down !

![Lama Ravager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f063bbecad1e51f5ec11cd79b25dbff1964b3ce4.jpeg)

---

## Video
It was created for this YouTube video so check it out for further information!
